settings.headline: Make Home Look Alive.
settings.lede: Kevin uses Swiss-engineered light, shadow, and everyday sound to make your home feel occupied before anyone tests the door.
settings.away_body: Light, shadow, and sound vary automatically.
settings.privacy_body: Simulation plays locally on the device.

settings.heading: Empty is an invitation.
settings.subheading: Most security products react after the risk has already started. Kevin is built for the moment before: when a home, flat, or office needs to look lived-in from the outside.
settings.tile_1_body: A siren starts after entry. Kevin adds visible presence beforehand, so your place looks like the harder target.
settings.tile_2_body: Footage can help later, but it does not make a quiet room feel occupied. Burglars still count on speed and distance.
settings.tile_3_body: Timers switch lamps on and off. Kevin creates changing shadows, TV-like flicker, and household sounds that feel more natural.

settings.heading: Deterrence that feels human.
settings.subheading: Place Kevin near a wall or ceiling it can use like a stage. From outside, coordinated light, movement, and sound make the room feel active, not automated.
settings.pillar_1_body: Bright, warm scenes make a room look lived-in instead of simply lit. Kevin varies the rhythm for mornings, evenings, and nights.
settings.pillar_2_body: Projected silhouettes and shifting light suggest people moving through the space, without cameras or microphones.
settings.pillar_3_body: Kitchen noise, TV ambience, footsteps, voices, and your own recordings help the simulation feel personal and less repetitive.

settings.heading: Plug in. Set routines. Leave calmly.
settings.subheading: No installation, no wiring, no monthly monitoring panel. Kevin starts with a simple setup and grows more useful through schedules, geofencing, and updates.
settings.step_1_body: Set it near a visible window with a wall or ceiling for shadows. Connect power and let the room become the stage.
settings.step_2_body: Use the app for weekly schedules, holiday mode, or geo-aware activation when you leave the area.
settings.step_3_body: Kevin plays varied light and sound scenarios from local storage, so your routines are not streamed from the cloud or shared with third parties.

settings.heading: Presence on your schedule.
settings.subheading: Turn Kevin on, plan weekly routines, and manage multiple devices from one simple app built for peace of mind.
settings.tile_1_body: Plan mornings, evenings, nights, weekends, and holidays so your home follows a believable rhythm while you are away.
settings.tile_2_body: Kevin can start when you leave the area, while still letting you trigger a simulation manually for quick errands.
settings.tile_3_body: Upload recordings and tag them by room or activity so the simulation can sound more like your household.
settings.tile_4_body: Use more than one Kevin for apartments, extra floors, offices, or second homes that should not feel abandoned.

settings.heading: A smarter layer for real life.
settings.subheading: Whether you travel, commute, run a small office, or already own an alarm, Kevin adds the missing signal: someone appears to be there.
settings.persona_1_body: Weekend away or long holiday, Kevin keeps the room active with varied scenes instead of a fixed light timer.
settings.persona_1_quote: "I wanted the house to feel occupied, not just illuminated. Kevin gives me that."
settings.persona_2_body: Keep it. Kevin complements detection with deterrence, helping your home look occupied before anyone considers entry.
settings.persona_2_quote: "Our alarm tells us if something happens. Kevin helps make the house look like the wrong target."
settings.persona_3_body: One device protects one visible stage. Add more Kevins for extra floors, offices, or second homes.
settings.persona_3_quote: "We use Kevin where the street can see the room. It changes the whole feeling from outside."

settings.heading: Realistic where it matters: from outside.
settings.quote_1: "From the pavement, the light and movement make the room feel occupied. That is exactly what I wanted."
settings.quote_2: "A friend thought someone was inside and rang the bell. Kevin did its job before anyone reached the door."
settings.quote_3: "The shadow effects are the part people notice. From the stairwell, the apartment does not feel empty."

settings.heading: Choose your security layer.
settings.subheading: Own Kevin outright or subscribe monthly. Either way, you get a privacy-first presence simulator built to deter before an alarm is needed.
settings.buy_features: Full device ownership|70+ hours of built-in simulations|Weekly schedules and geo-aware activation|Upload your own household sounds|Flexible placement with 3 m power cable|Free delivery|3-year warranty
settings.sub_features: Device included free|Premium simulation library|Regular software updates|Priority support|Hardware replacement support|Flexible for multiple rooms or properties|Free delivery

settings.heading: Designed to be simple, private, and portable.
Leave without advertising it.
settings.subheading: Kevin makes your home look and sound active with Swiss-engineered presence simulation. Free delivery. 60-second setup. No cameras or microphones.
